info.title: User Profile Service
info.description: This schema defines the structure of a user profile record used across our global identity services.

UserProfile.description: The primary data object representing a registered user.

user_id.description: A unique internal identifier assigned at registration. Do not modify.

display_name.description: The public-facing name chosen by the user for community interactions.

status.description: The current lifecycle state of the user account.

last_login.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp of the user's most recent session.
